version_description: This is the way Tom Petty played it. Includes chord legend, all breaks and backing vocals, and link to video. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1lWJXDG2i0A.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Song: Free fallin'
Artist: Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers
Composers: Tom Petty and Jeff Lynne
Album: Full Moon fever

Tabbed by DJ   8th April 2017

Links to live videos of Tom Petty playing this song:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EcgEf1kJ3wo
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UgZjwHNcWq

CAPO:1st fret
(Will then sound in the recorded key of F)

I would recommend using the voicings in the text
column numbers below.
Regarding the CHORD BOX DIAGRAMS please follow the
information at the bottom of the tab.

Chord names & fret positions are relative to the capo
E     = 022100   Bsus4 = x24400   A5 = 577xxx
Asus2 = x02200   E5    = 022xxx   B5 = 799xxx

^ = Emphasise the beats

Please take a second to scroll down to the bottom of
the page and select a star rating for my tab, thanks
=====================================================
[Intro]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
|  /  /__/  /  /  |  /__/  /__/  /  /  |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
She's a good girl,   loves her mama,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Loves Je - sus,  and Ameri -ca too,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
She's a good girl, she's crazy 'bout Elvis,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Loves hor - ses, and her boy  - friend too[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
And it's a long day  ...living in Re - seda,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
There's a free - way ...running through the yard,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Now, I'm a bad boy,  'cause I don't even miss her,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
I'm a bad boy ...for breaking her heart[/tab]

For all the GUITAR chord box diagrams to match my
suggested choices you need to manually select the
following choice of options by clicking on the
forward/backward arrows below three of the diagrams.
All the other chord boxes should be the default
first option and don't need any reselecting.
As long as you are logged into your account,
these choices will be saved automatically for every
time you view this tab
